task_updates.executor_notes: Clearly surfaced the after_execute human actions without performing them: U2 requires applying `supabase/migrations/202604300009_009_codebase_research.sql` to the target Supabase project after review/merge, and U3 requires configuring the chosen production scheduler to run `python scripts/cleanup_code_artifacts.py --store supabase`. Verified the migration path and cleanup documentation references. Full pytest was rerun and failed on unrelated/pre-existing dirty-worktree issues outside T20.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. U2 and U3 were surfaced as human operational actions, and neither the Supabase migration nor production scheduler configuration was performed by the executor.

surfaced_user_actions.action: Apply `supabase/migrations/202604300009_009_codebase_research.sql` to the target Supabase project after the migration SQL has been reviewed and merged.

Configure the chosen production scheduler, such as Supabase scheduled functions, pg_cron, Railway cron, or another operations mechanism, to run `python scripts/cleanup_code_artifacts.py --store supabase` for expired code artifact API cache cleanup.

validation.references: Verified references to the Supabase migration path and cleanup scheduling documentation/action text.
validation.full_suite: `python -m pytest -q`: 184 passed, 2 skipped, 2 failed.
